chunks.heading: Lead Frontend Engineer
chunks.content: BMW Group (2018–2019) — Lead Frontend Engineer. Innovation platforms for the BMW Group — strategic R&D challenges across future mobility, sustainability, connected vehicles. Patterns: Enterprise scale.

chunks.heading: Software Engineer
chunks.content: Deloitte (2016–2018) — Software Engineer. Enterprise data-visualization surfaces for clients in financial services and regulated industries. Patterns: Enterprise scale.

chunks.heading: Lead Frontend Engineer
chunks.content: Diligent (2019–2020) — Lead Frontend Engineer. Authored the company-wide React + Angular enterprise design system serving Fortune-1000-class governance products. Patterns: Design-system infrastructure, Enterprise scale.

chunks.heading: Lead Frontend Engineer
chunks.content: eino.ai (2023–2025) — Lead Frontend Engineer. Agentic RF network planning, digital-twin maps, real-time heatmaps. Shipped agentic UX ahead of industry adoption. Patterns: AI-native platforms, Agentic UX.

chunks.heading: Lead Engineer, Web Applications
chunks.content: Fueled (2025+) — Lead Engineer, Web Applications. Frontend architecture for enterprise web platforms across AI, media, and digital-transformation engagements. Patterns: AI-native platforms, Design-system infrastructure, Enterprise scale.

chunks.heading: VP of Engineering
chunks.content: Moment (2025) — VP of Engineering. Took an AI-native knowledge platform from prototype velocity to production reliability. Owned hiring, leveling, RFCs, on-call. Patterns: AI-native platforms, Agentic UX.

chunks.heading: Senior Software Engineer
chunks.content: Sky · NBCUniversal · Peacock (2020–2022) — Senior Software Engineer. Tens-of-millions-of-viewers scale on streaming + commerce surfaces. Reliability, latency, release safety on the surfaces where regressions hit minutes after deploy. Patterns: Streaming-grade reliability, Enterprise scale.

chunks.heading: Identity
chunks.content: Diogo Esteves — Staff / Principal Frontend & Platform Engineer. AI-native systems, enterprise UI infrastructure, scalable web architectures. Based in Lisbon, Portugal · Remote (US-aligned hours). Open to Staff+, Principal, Founding Engineer, and VP / Head of Engineering roles. Operating companies: Fueled, Moment, eino.ai, NBCUniversal · Peacock, Diligent, BMW Group, Deloitte.
